description: A test object for a DSP Network.

addRuntimeFunction.description: Sets a function that will be executed at the given time to simulate live user input.

checkCompileHashCodes.description: Checks whether the hash code of all compiled nodes match their network file.

createAsciiDiff.signature: String createAsciiDiff(var data1, var data2, int numLines)
createAsciiDiff.description: Creates a ASCII diff with 'X' as error when the datas don't match.

createBufferContentAsAsciiArt.description: Creates a string that vaguely represents the buffer data content.

dumpNetworkAsXml.description: Creates a XML representation of the current network.

expectEquals.signature: var expectEquals(var data1, var data2, float errorDb)
expectEquals.description: Compares the two data types and returns a error message if they don't match.

getDllInfo.description: Returns an object containing the information about the project dll.

getLastTestException.description: Returns the exception that was caused by the last test run (or empty if fine).

getListOfAllCompileableNodes.description: Returns the list of all nodes that can be compiled.

getListOfCompiledNodes.description: Returns the list of all compiled nodes.

runTest.description: runs the test and returns the buffer.

setProcessSpecs.signature: void setProcessSpecs(int numChannels, double sampleRate, int blockSize)
setProcessSpecs.description: Set the processing specifications for the test run.

setWaitingTime.description: Sets a time to wait between calling prepare and processing the data.
